heading: Voluntary liquidation
label: 623 Voluntary liquidation
text: Any corporation organized under this subchapter may go into voluntary liquidation and be closed by a vote of its shareholders owning two-thirds of its stock.
notes: References in TextAny corporation organized under this subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “Any such corporation”.

CodificationSection is comprised of par. 15 (undesignated) of section 25A of act , which comprises this subchapter. For complete classification of section 25A of this Act, see Codification note set out under .Dec. 23, 1913section 611 of this title
